title: Forgemaster
description: Lore mod for bsmp. adds a ton of cool stuff related to my character (still in prerelease for now)
body:
# Items added:
## Shard of Attacca 
- found in meteorites, these shards of the legendary sword can be used to reforge the blade

## Broken Blade of Attacca 
- crafted from 6 shards in a crafting table, half of the legendary blade

## Attacca 
- a legendary sword that was a gift from the god of the forge, a heavy sword that conducts flames with slow damaging strikes
### Acceso (Ignite)
 -- An ability of Attacca: The blade will gain charge for each tick you set an entity on fire for, with the base sword once you hit 32 charge and land a crit it will discharge the blade and apply Sparked to the target and deal extra damage

# Enchantments added:
## Affannato (Breathless)
- Allows the wielder of Attacca to instead spend their charge (with a max of 16) into a fireball that can be shot from the sword, spawning a circle of greek fire and exploding where it lands
## Comodo con Fuoco (Comfortable with Fire)
- Gives you a coolant effect after each hit that makes you impervious to fire damage for the duration

# Effects added:
## Sparked 
- After charging acceso the target is applied with sparked which amplifies fire damage by 1.5x while the effect is applied

# Structures added:
## Meoteorite 
- a meteorite that was used to transport the shards of attacca into this realm
